Operation 'getraildistanceresponse' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about the request ID parameter, return format (distance in km), and the polling pattern expected by AI agents. Enhanced version clarifies the asynchronous workflow and return value structure.

data.current_description: Retrieve the result of a rail distance calculation request.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve rail freight distance calculation result
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the result of a previously submitted rail distance calculation request using the request ID. Returns the calculated distance in kilometers and associated metadata. Use this operation after submitting a rail distance request to poll for the calculation result.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about the request ID parameter, return format (distance in km), and the polling pattern expected by AI agents. Enhanced version clarifies the asynchronous workflow and return value structure.

message: Operation 'createroaddistancerequest' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary lacks action clarity. Description missing critical details about request body structure, return value (request ID), and the asynchronous nature of the operation. AI agents need to understand they must use the returned ID to fetch results later.

data.current_description: Submit a request to calculate road freight distance.
data.summary_suggestion: Submit road freight distance calculation request
data.description_suggestion: Submits an asynchronous request to calculate road freight transport distance between two locations. Accepts origin and destination location codes in the DistanceRequest body. Returns a request ID that can be used to retrieve the calculation result via the getroaddistanceresponse endpoint. The calculation is processed asynchronously.
data.reasoning: Summary lacks action clarity. Description missing critical details about request body structure, return value (request ID), and the asynchronous nature of the operation. AI agents need to understand they must use the returned ID to fetch results later.
